title: Jeremiah 29:11 — God Has a Plan for You

scenes.narration: God said it thousands of years ago. And He's still saying it today — to you.
scenes.image_prompt: Ancient scroll unrolling to reveal glowing golden words, soft warm light surrounding it, peaceful and reverent atmosphere, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord.
scenes.image_prompt: God's gentle hands holding the world in warm golden light, children of many backgrounds looking up with wonder, bright colorful family-friendly illustration

scenes.narration: Plans to prosper you. Not to harm you.
scenes.image_prompt: A family sitting together in a sunlit garden, smiling and at peace, flowers blooming around them, warm golden light, bright colorful hopeful storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Plans to give you hope. And a future.
scenes.image_prompt: A child standing at the top of a hill looking out at a beautiful bright landscape ahead, path stretching into the sunlight, colorful hopeful storybook art, golden sky

scenes.narration: Sometimes life feels uncertain. Plans fall apart. Things don't work out the way we expected.
scenes.image_prompt: A child sitting alone looking sad in the rain, but a gentle warm light beginning to break through the clouds above them, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: But God sees the whole picture. Every step. Every setback. Every door that closes.
scenes.image_prompt: God's perspective from above looking down at a winding road through beautiful landscapes, a tiny person walking the path, warm golden birds-eye view storybook illustration

scenes.narration: He sees where it leads. And He is already there, waiting for you.
scenes.image_prompt: A glowing figure standing at the end of a beautiful sunlit path, arms open wide, warm golden light, colorful hopeful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: You are not forgotten. You are not an accident. You were made on purpose, for a purpose.
scenes.image_prompt: A child looking at their reflection in a calm pool of water, seeing themselves glowing with golden light, warm colorful storybook illustration, peaceful and loving

scenes.narration: Whatever you're facing right now — God already has a plan to bring you through it.
scenes.image_prompt: Child walking through a dark valley with a glowing shepherd figure beside them, light visible ahead, colorful hopeful bible illustration

scenes.narration: For I know the plans I have for you. Plans to give you hope... and a future.
scenes.image_prompt: Happy family together under a rainbow in a bright sunlit meadow, arms raised joyfully, God's golden light shining down, beautiful colorful storybook art
